title: rubus × bedaticus
intro: Rubus × bedaticus, also known as the Hybrid Raspberry, is a type of ornamental shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Rubus idaeus (wild raspberry) and Rubus fruticosus (black raspberry). The medicinal properties of Rubus × bedaticus include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × bedaticus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to help manage type 2 diabetes and certain types of cancer. Rubus × bedaticus can be prepared into herbal teas, jams, and extracts, which are often used to leverage its medicinal properties.
